summary: Iteration 7 - All 3 new features tested and working: 1) Customer User Management, 2) Company Creation with Default User, 3) Internal Requests for Selling Partners, 4) Partner Assignment History. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/customers/company-users - Customer can list company users
POST /api/customers/company-users - Customer can create new company user
PUT /api/customers/company-users/{id} - Customer can update company user
DELETE /api/customers/company-users/{id} - Customer can deactivate company user
Company-users endpoint denied for admin (403)
Duplicate email validation on company user creation
POST /api/companies with default_user fields creates customer user
Company creation without default user works
Selling partner company ignores default_user fields
Duplicate default_user_email returns 400
GET /api/leads/internal-requests - Selling partner can list internal requests
Internal requests endpoint denied for admin (403)
POST /api/leads/referral with is_internal_request=true creates internal request
Internal request appears in /api/leads/internal-requests list
Lead has empty partner_history initially
Assigning partner creates partner_history entry
Reassigning partner updates history (marks old as removed, adds new)
Partner history has correct structure (partner_id, partner_name, assigned_at, assigned_by, removed_at)
Frontend: Team Members page for customers working
Frontend: Add User dialog with all fields working

customer_user_management.details: Customers can manage team members via /company-users page. CRUD operations work. Users are created with customer role and same company_id.

company_creation_with_default_user.details: When creating Customer type company, admin can specify default_user_name, default_user_email, default_user_phone, default_user_password. User is auto-created with customer role.

internal_requests.details: Selling Partners have 'Internal Requests' menu item. Can create service requests via /api/leads/referral with is_internal_request=true. Requests appear in /api/leads/internal-requests.

partner_assignment_history.details: Lead detail page shows Partner Assignment History section for admin. Shows all partner assignments with assigned_at, assigned_by, removed_at timestamps. Current partner marked with 'Current' badge.

frontend_team_members_page.details: Customer sees 'Team Members' in sidebar. Page shows Total Users, Active Users stats. Table with Name, Email, Phone, Status, Joined, Actions columns. Add User dialog with Full Name, Email, Phone, Password fields.

frontend_company_dialog_default_user.details: Add Company dialog shows 'Default Customer User' section when Customer type selected. Fields: User Name*, User Email*, User Phone, Password (default: customer123).

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration7.py - Created comprehensive test file for all 3 new features
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests (TEST_Team Member, TEST_Update User, TEST_Delete User, TEST_Partner, TEST_History Partner 0/1). Test companies created (TEST_Company, TEST_NoUser Company, TEST_Partner Company). Test leads created (TEST_History Lead, TEST_Internal Request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features from iteration 7 are working: 1) Customer User Management - customers can add/edit/delete team members via /company-users page, 2) Company Creation with Default User - admin can create customer company with default user in one step, 3) Internal Requests - selling partners have separate menu for service requests, 4) Partner Assignment History - lead detail shows full history of partner assignments with timestamps. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration7.py.

sendgrid_email.reason: SendGrid API key not configured in backend/.env
sendgrid_email.behavior: Logs warning but does not fail

twilio_sms.reason: Twilio credentials not configured in backend/.env
twilio_sms.behavior: Logs warning but does not fail
